tasks.title: Project scaffolding + --version
tasks.description: Created main.rs with full clap command tree and mod.rs files. `msgraph --version` prints 0.1.0.

tasks.title: Config module
tasks.description: Config struct resolves client_id from MSGRAPH_CLIENT_ID env var, then ~/.config/msgraph/config.toml. Manual TOML parsing — no toml crate.

tasks.title: Token store
tasks.description: Keyring-based token storage using the `keyring` crate. Stores access_token, refresh_token, expires_at as JSON. Includes expiry check with 60-second buffer.

tasks.title: Device code OAuth2 flow
tasks.description: Full OAuth2 device code flow via ureq. Handles authorization_pending, slow_down, expired_token, and authorization_declined error codes.

tasks.title: Auth login command
tasks.description: handle_login() wires config + device_code + token_store. Prints success/error to stderr.

tasks.title: Graph client + mail API
tasks.description: GraphClient::new() loads tokens and auto-refreshes if expired. graph::mail::list_messages() fetches top 20 emails with minimal field selection.

tasks.title: Mail list command
tasks.description: handle_mail_list() creates GraphClient, calls mail::list_messages, prints pretty JSON to stdout.

tasks.title: Auth logout + project docs
tasks.description: handle_logout() clears keyring tokens. Created project-docs/plan.md and project-docs/tasks.json.
